starweb-engine.title: Web Engine
starweb-engine.description: A lightweight 2D game engine for the browser. Includes a fixed/variable game loop, canvas management, asset utilities, and per-frame input state for keyboard and pointer.

starweb-physics.title: Starweb Physics
starweb-physics.description: SAT and circle collision detection for the browser.

starweb-tween.title: Starweb Tween
starweb-tween.description: Frame-driven tween manager with easing for the browser.

starweb-audio.title: Starweb Audio
starweb-audio.description: Web Audio API playback, volume, and sound management for the browser.
